test.name: Valid Login And Stay On Same Page

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout that is used by various keywords.

kw.name: Set Selenium Implicit Wait
kw.doc: Sets the implicit wait value used by Selenium.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: return document.readyState === 'complete' Without any arguments.
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: return document.readyState === 'complete' Without any arguments.
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.arg: const btn = document.evaluate("//input[@id='login-password']/ancestor::div[contains(@class,'space-y-6')]//button[normalize-space()='เข้าสู่ระบบ']", document, null, XPathResult.FIRST_ORDERED_NODE_TYPE, null).singleNodeValue;
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Press Keys
kw.doc: Simulates the user pressing key(s) to an element or on the active browser.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.arg: const btn = document.evaluate("//input[@id='login-password']/ancestor::div[contains(@class,'space-y-6')]//button[normalize-space()='เข้าสู่ระบบ']", document, null, XPathResult.FIRST_ORDERED_NODE_TYPE, null).singleNodeValue;
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//input[@id='login-password']/ancestor::div[contains(@class,'space-y-6')]//button[normalize-space()='เข้าสู่ระบบ']'.
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: Normal modal submit click failed. Using JavaScript click.
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.arg: const btn = document.evaluate("//input[@id='login-password']/ancestor::div[contains(@class,'space-y-6')]//button[normalize-space()='เข้าสู่ระบบ']", document, null, XPathResult.FIRST_ORDERED_NODE_TYPE, null).singleNodeValue;
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait For Login Success On Same Page
Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: return document.readyState === 'complete' Without any arguments.
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Run Keyword And Return Status
Page Should Contain Element
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Page Should Contain Element
kw.msg: Current page contains element 'xpath=//button[@id='dropdownNavbarLink' and not(contains(normalize-space(.),'เข้าสู่ระบบ'))]'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Fail
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Page Should Stay On Home After Login
Get Location
kw.doc: Returns the current browser window URL.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: No Operation
kw.doc: Does absolutely nothing.
